---
title: "Data Analysis"
---

## Data Overview

```{python}
import os
import pandas as pd
from pandas.errors import EmptyDataError

path = 'data/lightcast_job_postings.csv'
if os.path.exists(path) and os.path.getsize(path) > 0:
    try:
        df = pd.read_csv(path)
        print(df.shape)
    except EmptyDataError:
        print(f"The file '{path}' exists but contains no data.")
else:
    print(f"The file '{path}' is missing or empty. Please add valid CSV data before publishing.")
```
